name: @plannotator/pi-extension
description: Plannotator extension for Pi coding agent - interactive plan review with visual annotation
author: backnotprop

scripts.build: cp ../hook/dist/index.html plannotator.html && cp ../hook/dist/review.html review-editor.html && cp ../../packages/shared/feedback-templates.ts feedback-templates.ts && cp ../../packages/shared/review-core.ts review-core.ts && cp ../../packages/shared/storage.ts storage-core.ts && cp ../../packages/shared/draft.ts draft-core.ts && cp ../../packages/shared/project.ts project-core.ts
